command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
JOB="job-20260625T142938Z-168bdb50"
BASE="/home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/jobs/$JOB"

echo "=== CANDIDATE PATCH (actual change) ==="
grep -A5 "moreno_wave12_admission" $BASE/candidate.patch | head -20

echo "=== VALIDATION.JSON summary ==="
python3 -c "
import json
d = json.load(open("$BASE/validation.json"))
det = d.get("deterministic",{})
print("deterministic overall:", det.get("status"))
for chk in det.get("checks",[]):
    print(" ", chk["name"], "=", chk["status"])
local_val = d.get("local_validation",{})
if local_val:
    print("local_validation overall:", local_val.get("status"))
    print("issues:", local_val.get("issues",[]))
" 2>/dev/null || cat $BASE/validation.json | head -30

echo "=== SHA256 OF FIXED CORE.PY ==="
sha256sum /home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub/core.py

echo "=== SHA256 OF UPDATED CONFIG ==="
sha256sum /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json
' 2>&1
echo DONE_1986
